text.message: Banking on 0 8’s or 6’s this game, I can feel it
The guy that has been plowed twice?
dont anticipate anything useful coming from ya
If you change you mind and want to chat to each other I can be your medium
last game red chose their placements trying to plow someone, lost the race, and then griefed them the rest of the game
it was unhinged even for this website lol
That must have been a different player or game?
This is my first game today my guy
we were in the last game together
This is genuinely my first game today
you do know we can check history? haha
It will show blue was correct
But in fairness it didn’t go down the way he said
Why am i getting hit so hard?  I have no port options
Probably the 2 cities and the mono you have
How do you know I have 2 cities?!
I have 2 numbers haha so it is feast or famine here
Oj why you do this to me?
Maybe you being in the lead
can i get a wood so i dont get plowed
if red plows me, i will never be able to fight road
I am not trying to plow
So i am tied with black and its only because I have LR and I am still the main target?
Black goign to cruise to victory
Even after OJ called him out as target…
Until I have army red, you're my focus
i mean it seems like they're a knight from winning potentially
if im ever going to fight road, i will need to settle on some better wood
And black has an RB probably
not even sure what they plan to use their wood for
ah i guess that would make sesne
well i guess i dont mind as long as they never ask me to take road lol
Ok are we done with me now oj?
Still bet a lot you have mono
More brick just means a bigger mono on me blue...
lesson the blow of black's mono :)
If he doesn’t use here then you have it oj
So blue has ruined a second game
Getting people on board with the wrong strategy
